member.name: T:SharpDeck.Extensions.Hosting.StreamDeckPluginHost
member.summary: Provides an all-in-one solution for hosting a Stream Deck plugin including logging, configuration, and connectivity setup.

member.name: M:SharpDeck.Extensions.Hosting.StreamDeckPluginHost.CreateDefaultBuilder
member.summary: Creates a with configuration, NLog logging, and Stream Deck connectivity all configured.

member.name: M:SharpDeck.Extensions.Hosting.StreamDeckPluginHost.RunAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs the Stream Deck plugin asynchronously.
member.param: The optional cancellation token that can be used to stop the plugin.
member.returns: The task of running the Stream Deck plugin.
